keyValues.transaction.invalid.status.for.deletion: You cannot delete a transaction with status '{0}'.
keyValues.deleted.transaction.cannot.be.edited: You cannot edit a transaction that has already been deleted.
keyValues.transaction.already.deleted: This transaction has already been deleted.
keyValues.transaction.not.found: The transaction could not be found.
keyValues.transaction.date.out.of.range: Transaction date must be within the last 2 months and no more than 1 hour in the future.
keyValues.transaction.who.delete.user.id.required: ID of the user deleting the transaction must be provided.
keyValues.transaction.amount.must.be.positive: Transaction amount must be greater than 0.
keyValues.transaction.amount.max.two.decimal.place: Transaction amount can have at most 2 decimal places.
Sender and receiver cannot be the same.
keyValues.transaction.sender.or.receiver.required: At least one of sender or receiver must be specified.
keyValues.transaction.range.start.before.end: Start date cannot be later than end date.
